overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy traversing a lush post-apocalyptic landscape. The character runs through dense forests, sneaks through tall red grass past a mechanical creature, and continues along rocky mountain trails under bright daylight.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail along cliff wall

agents.ego_description: running steadily along a narrow forest path beside a large rock cliff, navigating through dense vegetation

entered.detail: massive tree trunk with rough bark texture
tall reddish rock wall covered in patches of moss and vines
dense green fern undergrowth lining the path
tall coniferous trees forming a dense forest canopy

segments.scene_description: The character runs through a narrow forest corridor with a large red rock cliff on the right and dense green ferns underfoot. Tall pine trees rise in the distance as the camera follows the character's movement through the enclosed trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: open red grass plains with mechanical patrol

events.description: exits dense forest into open field of tall red grass
encounters mechanical creature with blue energy trails, enters stealth crouch

agents.ego_description: crouching low in tall red grass, stealthily approaching a mechanical creature while staying hidden

notable_agents.action: mechanical quadruped creature patrolling through the red grass emitting blue energy

entered.detail: waist-high crimson grass swaying in the wind
ruined structures visible on the horizon against the mountains

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide field of vibrant red grass where the character enters stealth mode. A mechanical creature with glowing blue energy patrols nearby as the character crouches through the tall crimson vegetation, with ancient ruins visible in the distant mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain passage with natural stone arch

events.description: passes through large natural stone archway into rocky terrain

agents.ego_description: running through rocky terrain and passing under a large natural stone archway

entered.detail: large natural rock formation forming an arch over the path
scattered boulders covered in green moss

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the red grass into a rocky area dominated by a large natural stone archway. Running along a dirt path, the character passes through the arch as mossy boulders line the left side of the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: open hillside trail with distant vistas

agents.ego_description: running steadily along an open hillside trail with expansive views of the valley below

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff wall rising on the right side of the path
tall spire-like structure visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows the character along an open hillside trail with a steep cliff face on the right. The terrain opens up to reveal expansive views of the valley below, with a distant tower visible on the horizon as the character continues running along the winding dirt path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a confined forest corridor into an open wilderness of vibrant flora and rocky formations. It begins by trailing the character through a narrow trail of dense green ferns beneath a towering red rock cliff and distant pine trees. As the enclosed path opens up, the environment shifts into a wide field of crimson grass where the character crouches in stealth to avoid a patrolling mechanical creature with glowing blue energy. The scene then expands further as the character emerges from the red vegetation onto a dirt path, passing beneath a massive natural stone archway flanked by mossy boulders.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rugged hillside trail that gradually opens into an expansive valley vista. It begins with the character running along a winding dirt path, flanked by a steep, imposing cliff face on the right. As the character progresses, the terrain expands to reveal a wide, sweeping view of the lowlands below. The scene then shifts its focus toward the horizon, where a distant tower emerges against the skyline before the camera continues to track the character's forward momentum across the open landscape.
